hero.headline: BITS Pilani WILP Online MBA in Manufacturing Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: BITS Pilani WILP MBA with a Manufacturing Management specialisation. NAAC A+, UGC approved (548th meeting), NIRF #7 University 2025, Institution of Eminence. Supply Chain Management core in Sem 3, with Digital Manufacturing, Manufacturing Strategy, Statistical Quality Control, and Supply Chain Analytics electives. Rs 2,98,400 total across 4 semesters with no-cost EMI. In-person exams at 40+ centres. A rare niche manufacturing MBA.

sections.tldr: BITS Pilani WILP MBA Manufacturing Management: NAAC A+, NIRF #7 University 2025, Institution of Eminence, Rs 2,98,400 total fee across 4 semesters, no-cost EMI via BITS Pilani. Supply Chain Management core in Sem 3, with domain electives in Digital Manufacturing, Integrated Management System, Manufacturing Strategy, Product Design and Development, Statistical Quality Control, Supply Chain Analytics, and Sustainable Manufacturing. In-person exams at 40+ designated centres. No placements. Minimum 1 year work experience required. One of the few standalone manufacturing management MBAs in the UGC-DEB online space. Strong for working professionals in automotive, FMCG, pharma, and industrial manufacturing.

about.body:
The BITS Pilani WILP Online MBA in Manufacturing Management is offered by Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani, through its Work Integrated Learning Programmes (WILP) division. BITS Pilani holds NAAC A+ accreditation, NIRF #7 in the University category 2025, and Institution of Eminence status from UGC. The UGC approved WILP in its 548th meeting.

This is a niche specialisation. Very few UGC-DEB online MBA programmes offer a standalone Manufacturing Management track. BITS Pilani's engineering heritage makes this a natural fit. Supply Chain Management forms the Sem 3 specialisation core. Domain electives include Digital Manufacturing, Integrated Management System, Manufacturing Strategy, Product Design and Development, Statistical Quality Control, Supply Chain Analytics, and Sustainable Manufacturing.

BITS Pilani uses experiential learning methods including simulations, virtual labs, and remote labs. This is a work-integrated programme. WILP requires candidates to be currently employed with minimum 1 year of work experience. The programme does not offer placement drives. All mid-term and end-term exams are conducted in-person at 40+ designated exam centres across India. Only quizzes and continuous assessments are virtual.

sem3Subjects.name: Managerial Economics
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse demand, supply, cost functions, pricing strategies, and market structures. Apply microeconomic reasoning to manufacturing and industrial decision-making.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management and Business Policy
sem3Subjects.description: Develop corporate strategy frameworks, competitive analysis, and policy formulation for manufacturing organisations and industrial enterprises.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design and optimise supply chain networks, procurement strategy, inventory management, logistics planning, and supplier relationship management. Specialisation core for Manufacturing Management.

sem3Subjects.name: Domain Elective 1
sem3Subjects.description: Choose from: Digital Manufacturing, Integrated Management System, Manufacturing Strategy, Product Design and Development, Statistical Quality Control, Supply Chain Analytics, Sustainable Manufacturing.

sem4Subjects.name: Domain Elective 2
sem4Subjects.description: Choose from the Manufacturing Management domain elective pool. Options include Digital Manufacturing, Manufacturing Strategy, Statistical Quality Control, Supply Chain Analytics, and Sustainable Manufacturing.

sem4Subjects.name: Domain Elective 3 / General Management Elective
sem4Subjects.description: Choose a third domain elective or a General Management elective from the university pool. General Management options include AI for Competitive Advantage, Data Visualization, Project Management, Technology Management, Enterprise Risk Management, and others.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Complete a capstone project applying manufacturing management concepts to a real industrial or production challenge. Projects are evaluated through presentation and viva.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared MBA core subjects across all BITS Pilani WILP specialisations. Sem 3-4 introduce specialisation-specific and elective subjects. General Management Elective pool includes Advanced Marketing Management, AI for Competitive Advantage, Business Environment Laws Ethics, Business Research Methods, Data Visualization, Decision Analysis, Entrepreneurship, Entrepreneurial Finance, Enterprise Risk Management, Indian Ethos, International Business and Trade, Leadership and Managing Change, Management Control Systems, Project Management, Strategic HRM, and Technology Management.

whoHires.body:
Manufacturing Management MBA graduates from BITS Pilani WILP target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Automotive manufacturing, FMCG, Pharmaceutical production, Industrial engineering, Aerospace and defence, Steel and metals, Chemical manufacturing

**Entry-level roles:** Production Supervisor, Supply Chain Analyst, Quality Analyst, Manufacturing Operations Associate

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Plant Manager, Supply Chain Manager, Operations Manager, Manufacturing Strategy Lead, Quality Head

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Manufacturing, Director Supply Chain, Chief Operations Officer, Head of Production

**Note:** BITS Pilani WILP does not conduct placement drives. This programme is for working professionals only. Career progression depends on your existing employment trajectory and how you apply programme skills.

skills.body:
The BITS Pilani WILP Manufacturing Management specialisation builds production leadership and operational excellence skills:

**Technical skills:**
- Supply Chain Management: end-to-end supply chain design, procurement, inventory optimisation, and logistics strategy
- Statistical Quality Control: control charts, process capability analysis, acceptance sampling, and quality assurance methods
- Digital Manufacturing: Industry 4.0, IoT-enabled production lines, automation, and smart factory concepts
- Supply Chain Analytics: data-driven supply chain optimisation, demand forecasting models, and logistics analytics

**Applied skills:**
- Manufacturing Strategy: production planning, capacity management, make-vs-buy decisions, and competitive manufacturing positioning
- Integrated Management System: quality, environment, and safety management systems integration (ISO frameworks)
- Product Design and Development: product lifecycle management, design for manufacturability, and new product introduction
- Sustainable Manufacturing: green manufacturing, circular economy in production, and sustainability metrics

**Management skills:** Strategic Management and Business Policy, Managerial Economics, and General Management electives in leadership, project management, and technology management.

comparisons.body:
Comparing BITS Pilani WILP MBA Manufacturing Management against peers:

**vs DPU Online MBA Operations Management (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU (formerly D.Y. Patil) is NAAC A++ at lower fees. DPU Operations covers broader operations management. BITS Pilani Manufacturing Management is a niche spec focusing specifically on manufacturing, supply chain, and production strategy. BITS Pilani carries NIRF #7 University 2025 and Institution of Eminence status. DPU has the NAAC A++ edge. Choose DPU for lower cost and broader operations scope. Choose BITS Pilani if the manufacturing focus, BITS brand, and NIRF rank matter for your career.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA Operations Management (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias is significantly cheaper at about one-third the BITS Pilani WILP fee. Galgotias covers general operations management. BITS Pilani offers a dedicated manufacturing track with electives in Digital Manufacturing, Sustainable Manufacturing, and Manufacturing Strategy that Galgotias does not match. BITS Pilani's NAAC A+, NIRF #7, and Institution of Eminence status are in a different tier. Choose Galgotias if budget is the primary constraint. Choose BITS Pilani for institutional prestige and manufacturing specialisation depth.

Use the compare tool at /compare to evaluate side by side.

fees.body:
BITS Pilani WILP MBA in Manufacturing Management has a total programme fee of Rs 2,98,400 across 4 semesters.

**Fee breakdown:**
- Application fee: Rs 1,500 (one-time, non-refundable)
- Admission fee: Rs 16,500 (one-time)
- Semester 1: Rs 88,100 (Rs 70,100 semester fee + Rs 16,500 admission + Rs 1,500 application)
- Semesters 2-4: Rs 70,100 each
- **Total: Rs 2,98,400**

**No-cost EMI**: Available directly through BITS Pilani.

**Important - Exam mode**: Mid-term and end-term examinations are conducted IN-PERSON at BITS Pilani designated exam centres across India (40+ centres). Only continuous assessments are virtual.

**No placements**: WILP is for working professionals. No campus placement drives.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with BITS Pilani each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: Graduates receive a degree certificate issued by BITS Pilani under UGC norms. The certificate reads Master of Business Administration. The Manufacturing Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. BITS Pilani carries Institution of Eminence status, NAAC A+ accreditation, and NIRF #7 University 2025 ranking. The BITS Pilani name is particularly strong in engineering and manufacturing sectors.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from BITS Pilani WILP MBA Manufacturing Management students. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Rajesh M.
items.liked: This is the only standalone manufacturing MBA I found in the online space. Supply Chain Management core and Digital Manufacturing elective were directly applicable to my auto-sector role. BITS Pilani name carries weight in engineering companies.
items.disliked: In-person exams twice a semester meant travelling to the nearest centre. Fee is on the higher side at Rs 2.98L.
items.body: A rare manufacturing-specific MBA from a top-tier engineering institution. Supply Chain Analytics and Digital Manufacturing electives are genuinely useful for Industry 4.0 roles. In-person exams keep the degree credible. No placements, but as a working professional in automotive, that was expected.

items.name: Sunita P.
items.liked: Sustainable Manufacturing elective was forward-looking. NIRF #7 and Institution of Eminence status made the MBA credible with my pharma manufacturing employer for a promotion.
items.disliked: Smaller batch size meant fewer peer discussions. Would have liked more case studies from Indian manufacturing companies.
items.body: Solid manufacturing management curriculum. The BITS Pilani brand is particularly recognised in manufacturing and engineering sectors. Sustainable Manufacturing and Integrated Management System electives were relevant to my pharma production role. Exams are in-person, so plan accordingly.

items.name: Amit G.
items.liked: Manufacturing Strategy and Product Design and Development electives filled knowledge gaps for my mid-management role in industrial machinery.
items.disliked: Rs 2.98L is steep compared to DPU Operations at Rs 1.89L. Limited elective variety compared to broader specs like Digital Transformation.
items.body: Good niche programme if manufacturing is your career path. The BITS Pilani credential and Institution of Eminence tag helped during internal promotion discussions. Fewer elective options than broader specs, but each one is directly relevant to manufacturing. No placements, which was clear upfront.

faqs.question: Are BITS Pilani WILP MBA exams online?
faqs.answer: No. Mid-term and end-term examinations are conducted in-person at BITS Pilani designated exam centres across India (40+ centres). Only quizzes and continuous assessments are virtual. Plan for travel to the nearest exam centre each semester.

faqs.question: Does BITS Pilani WILP offer placements for MBA students?
faqs.answer: No. WILP is designed for working professionals with minimum 1 year work experience. There are no campus placement drives. Career progression depends on your existing employment and how you apply programme skills.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for BITS Pilani WILP MBA Manufacturing Management?
faqs.answer: Rs 2,98,400 across 4 semesters. This includes Rs 1,500 application fee, Rs 16,500 admission fee, and Rs 70,100 per semester. No-cost EMI is available directly through BITS Pilani.

faqs.question: Is Manufacturing Management a rare online MBA specialisation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Very few UGC-DEB online MBA programmes offer a standalone Manufacturing Management track. Most universities offer Operations Management as the closest alternative. BITS Pilani's engineering heritage makes this a natural fit with dedicated electives in Digital Manufacturing, Manufacturing Strategy, and Sustainable Manufacturing.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BITS Pilani WILP MBA?
faqs.answer: 60% marks in graduation from a recognised university. Candidates must be currently employed with minimum 1 year of work experience. WILP is specifically for working professionals.

faqs.question: What manufacturing management electives can I choose?
faqs.answer: Domain electives include Digital Manufacturing, Integrated Management System, Manufacturing Strategy, Product Design and Development, Statistical Quality Control, Supply Chain Analytics, and Sustainable Manufacturing. You also have access to the General Management Elective pool.

chooseIf: You work in manufacturing, automotive, pharma production, or industrial engineering and want a manufacturing-specific MBA from BITS Pilani (NIRF #7, Institution of Eminence, NAAC A+).
You want a rare standalone manufacturing management specialisation with electives in Digital Manufacturing, Sustainable Manufacturing, and Supply Chain Analytics that most online MBAs do not offer.
You value the BITS Pilani engineering brand for manufacturing sector career progression and are comfortable with in-person exams at 40+ centres.
consider: If budget is the primary factor, DPU Operations Management at Rs 1,89,400 (NAAC A++) or Galgotias Operations at Rs 86,400 offer broader operations management at lower cost.
If you want online-only exams without travel, BITS Pilani WILP requires in-person exams. Other programmes with online proctored exams may suit better.
If you need broader operations management rather than manufacturing-specific content, a general Operations Management specialisation at DPU or other universities may be more versatile.
